column1: question
How many reams of copy paper do you currently have available?
I need spiral notebooks for my team — can you tell me how many 3-packs you have right now?
Do you carry ballpoint pens?
Do you carry staplers?
I'm looking to buy manila file folders in bulk. How many packs do you have remaining?
I've been trying to order copy paper all week and your website keeps crashing. Just tell me — do you even have any left and how much does it cost?
We go through a LOT of pens. I need to know exactly how many blue ballpoint pen packs are in your warehouse before I commit to ordering.
Can you check if you have spiral notebooks AND staplers in stock?
I'm looking for pet food for my cats, do you carry Purina?
OK here's what I need: 1) How many reams of copy paper do you have? 2) What's the price on blue pens? 3) Do you offer free shipping?
What are the hours you are open?
I'd like to order some sticky notes — what quantity do you currently have in stock?
How many rolls of packing tape do you have on the shelves right now?
I'm very unhappy with the stapler I received. It only staples 3 sheets before it jams!
I need paper clips for the office. How many boxes do you have left in inventory?
What is your return policy? How long do I have to return something?
I got a defective pen in my last order and nobody has gotten back to me in THREE DAYS. What am I supposed to do? Do I just eat the cost?
How much does shipping cost and how long does it take to get my order?
I placed an order yesterday and realized I put the wrong address. Can you change it? What are my options?
This is the THIRD time I've called about my lost package. Tracking says delivered but I never got it. What exactly is your process for this?
What payment methods do you accept? Can I pay with a purchase order?
How do I set up a business account? What are the benefits?
Where is your closest distribution center to Chicago? Can I pick up my order in person?
What are your customer service hours? I keep calling and no one picks up on weekends.
How long has OfficeFlow been around? I want to make sure I'm buying from a reputable company.
